flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Brunswick Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 1.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Brunswick Community College rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 (32.9% → 36.4%).
